content.scenarioHint: 早晨在茶水间遇到同事，你主动打招呼并询问对方近况
content.speakerText: Good morning, Sam! How are you doing today?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，Sam！今天过得怎么样？
expectedAnswers: Morning! I'm good, thanks for asking. How about you?
Not too bad! Just trying to wake up with this coffee.
Could be better, but I'm hanging in there. You?
Pretty decent! Got a big meeting later, but all set.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然地开启了早晨问候对话
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场晨间对话的口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 morning / how are you / thanks 等核心表达

content.speakerText: Good morning, Tom! How are you today?
expectedAnswers: I'm doing well, thanks! How about you?
Not too bad. The coffee here is amazing today.
Pretty good! Slept well last night.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应问候并适当扩展或反问
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态和词汇
表达自然度：包含生活细节，体现真实对话感
